languages.text: {n}Старейшины Детей Искупления о чем-то перешептываются, но при вашем приближении тут же замолкают и склоняются в глубоком поклоне.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Старейшины Детей Искупления о чем-то перешептываются, но при вашем приближении тут же замолкают и склоняются в глубоком поклоне.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The elders of Children of Redemption are whispering among themselves, but as you approach, they quickly fall silent and greet you with a deep bow.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Старейшины Детей Искупления о чем-то перешептываются, но при вашем приближении тут же замолкают и склоняются в глубоком поклоне.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The elders of Children of Redemption are whispering among themselves, but as you approach, they quickly fall silent and greet you with a deep bow.{/n}
{n}The elders of Children of Redemption are whispering among themselves, but as you approach, they quickly fall silent and greet you with a deep bow.{/n}
{n}The elders of Children of Redemption are whispering among themselves, but as you approach, they quickly fall silent and greet you with a deep bow.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Ältesten der Kinder der Erlösung tuscheln miteinander, aber als du näher kommst, verstummen sie schnell und grüßen dich mit einer tiefen Verbeugung.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The elders of Children of Redemption are whispering among themselves, but as you approach, they quickly fall silent and greet you with a deep bow.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les anciens de Children of Redemption chuchotent entre eux, mais à votre approche, ils se taisent rapidement et vous saluent en s'inclinant profondément.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The elders of Children of Redemption are whispering among themselves, but as you approach, they quickly fall silent and greet you with a deep bow.{/n}

languages.text: {n}救赎之子 "的长老们正在窃窃私语，但当您走近时，他们很快安静下来，并向您深深鞠躬致意。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The elders of Children of Redemption are whispering among themselves, but as you approach, they quickly fall silent and greet you with a deep bow.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Los ancianos de Hijos de la Redención cuchichean entre ellos, pero cuando te acercas, se callan rápidamente y te saludan con una profunda reverencia.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The elders of Children of Redemption are whispering among themselves, but as you approach, they quickly fall silent and greet you with a deep bow.{/n}

languages.text: {n}チルドレン・オブ・リデンプションの長老たちはひそひそ話していたが、あなたが近づくと、すぐに黙り込み、深々とお辞儀をして挨拶した。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The elders of Children of Redemption are whispering among themselves, but as you approach, they quickly fall silent and greet you with a deep bow.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Kefaretin Çocukları'nın büyükleri kendi aralarında fısıldaşıyorlar ama siz yaklaşınca hemen sessizleşiyorlar ve sizi derin bir selamla selamlıyorlar.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The elders of Children of Redemption are whispering among themselves, but as you approach, they quickly fall silent and greet you with a deep bow.{/n}
